column3: Text
yo. you good?
okay so... slight change of plans
i may have not told you the whole thing
dude. where am i
pocket dimension. private islands. rich people stuff
look i didn't wanna freak you out before you agreed
AGREED? you said join a call!
technically you did join. just... physically
look there's a port building behind you. i stashed something there
go through the back entrance. there's a suit
a suit
trust me. you'll need it
through here. watch your head
put it on
okay now the real talk
this place is guarded by AI. they call them clankers
trained on the worst content imaginable
they're... not smart. but there's a lot of them
zero i swear to god
you know you can doule jump now right?
nice. now try the air dash
this thing lets you wallrun too by the way
why am i doing this again?
ram. lots of it. more than you've ever seen
sick
please zero i need this. my pc is kinda ramless
that's the spirit
hit that sphere to gain charge. Thank me later
heads up. Clanker
hit it
take a drop on this one
did that one just say bombardiro crocodilo
told you. worst content imaginable
mansion's up the hill. that's where the good stuff is
first RAM cache should be inside
it better be worth getting teleported to another dimension
oh it is
clear the floors. RAM vault should be in the basement
nice. that's a suit upgrade. install it
feeling it?
okay this is actually sick
told you. now there's a datacenter on the other side of the island
that's the real target
main hall. see those server racks? destroy enough of them
the RAM unit is in the fridge in the center. it's shielded
take out the racks and the shield goes down
shield's down. break the container and grab it
got it. downloading ram dot exe
hilarious. sending it to me now
okay that was fast
what
i'm in. decrypting now
oh no
what. what is it
this isn't just RAM storage
these are files. real files. names. dates. everything
files about what
about THEM. the owners. what they've been doing
we know too much now
both of us
zero...
we're cooked bro
